title: beyeria disciformis
intro: Beyeria disciformis is a species of shrub in the family Cephalotaceae, commonly known as the disc-form Beyeria. It is native to Western Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Beyeria disciformis is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it has been used in the form of a tincture or a topical cream to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
